title: OpticManager
description: Change length of day & night. Synchronize client-side configuration.
body: This mod allows for client settings to be synchronized across a server. Furthermore the day & night cycle can be modified as well, it should be compatible with all mods (even mods which change behavior about sleeping etc.). Requires CreativeCore **Configurations** * brightness * day & night time * day & night light factor * day & night brightness * visible nametag * hide chat * only admins can change these configurations Looking for a server to play with your friends. Our sponsor got you covered: [ ](https://bisecthosting.com/teamcreative) Use the promo code teamcreative to get 25% off the first month on any of the gaming servers! [](https://www.patreon.com/creativemd)
